item.description:
# CodexMate 0.0.14
- Kept Desktop-started turns in the running state until a completion hint arrives, so quiet long-running commands no longer disappear from CodexMate after the short running-hint window. - Added a safety timeout for inferred active turns when no completion signal is available. - Prevented stale desktop running evidence from reviving threads that already have authoritative terminal activity. - Added regression coverage for long-running quiet turns, pending-state preservation, completion handling, and stale running cleanup.
